description: Developers are getting 'strict decoding errors' when deploying their Database manifests because the CustomResourceDefinition (CRD) in the cluster doesn't recognize a new field. Update the 'databases.platform.local' CRD schema to include the 'backupRetentionDays' field with compliance constraints based on the requirements in /home/ga/Desktop/TICKET-881.txt. Fix and apply the blocked manifest at /home/ga/Desktop/billing-db.yaml. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
